content: Bob, I received your initial plan but the approval request ID isn't valid anymore. Please resubmit your refactoring plan for my review and approval.
Bob, I'm waiting for you to resubmit your refactoring plan. Please submit an approval request with your updated plan.
Bob, please submit a NEW plan approval request using the plan_approval protocol. I need to see your plan in a fresh request that I can approve or reject.
Bob, please submit your refactoring plan for approval. I need a plan_approval request with your detailed plan so I can review it.
Bob, please acknowledge the shutdown request with request_id f4ec4be1 and shut down gracefully. Your services are no longer needed.
